meaning: adv.颤抖着,摇动着,虚弱不堪地,不稳定地,不坚定地
examples: That's impossible! One of the advisors said shakily.
It is progressing shakily and still needs outside help.
Upul Tharanga anchored Sri Lanka's innings with an unbeaten 86, beginning shakily but playing some fine shots later on.
Sehwag had started shakily, surviving a confident shout for lbw from Pedro Collins when he had yet to score.
